reason: Successfully navigated to the app, found and clicked the "QA-20260424-191439-jvzr" agent, verified its status was "idle", sent a math question, and received the correct response "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing three agents.
Clicked on "QA-20260424-191439-jvzr" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened, displaying the agent name and status indicator.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" (satisfies requirement).
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" in the message input field — Text entered successfully in the input field.
Clicked Send button to submit the message — Message was sent, agent transitioned to "working" status, and a new session "Math Basics Question Session" was created.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Response arrived within 2 seconds, agent returned to "idle" status.
Verified the response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response displays "4" in the chat. Screenshot confirms correct response.
